title: Sponsor your spouse, partner or child - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsor your spouse, partner or child
This is a program to sponsor your spouse, common-law partner, conjugal partner or dependent child to become a permanent resident of Canada.
Check application processing times
Sponsor a spouse or partner: from Error loading fee. Check the fee list .
Sponsor a child: from Error loading fee. Check the fee list .
Processing times will vary based on
- the type of application
- if the application is complete
- how quickly we expect to process applications we’ve already received
- how easily we can verify your information
- how long you take to respond to any requests or concerns
Your processing time may also be affected if more people apply to immigrate to Canada than we can bring in
            each year.
Learn how processing times are calculated .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
